title: abutilon abutiloides
intro: Abutilon abutiloides, also known as the Indian mallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural diuretic. Abutilon abutiloides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
